content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Compare version numbers". Refer to LeetCode description: https://leetcode.com/problems/compare-version-numbers/
constraints: version1 and version2 consist only of digits and '.'
version1 and version2 are valid version numbers
content.outputFormat: An integer, 1 if version1 > version2, -1 if version1 < version2, 0 if version1 == version2

solution.approach: Split the version strings into arrays of integers, compare the versions
solution.timeComplexity: O(max(m, n)) where m and n are the lengths of version1 and version2 respectively

code.Python3:
def compareVersion(version1: str, version2: str) -> int:
    i, j = 0, 0
    v1, v2 = 0, 0
    while i < len(version1) or j < len(version2):
        while i < len(version1) and version1[i] != '.':
            v1 = v1 * 10 + int(version1[i])
            i += 1
        while j < len(version2) and version2[j] != '.':
            v2 = v2 * 10 + int(version2[j])
            j += 1
        if v1 > v2: return 1
        if v1 < v2: return -1
        v1, v2 = 0, 0
        if i < len(version1): i += 1
        if j < len(version2): j += 1
    return 0
